---
title: SWOT Hydrocron Time Series Tutorials
subtitle: Example workflows using Hydrocron
---

## Tutorials

#### [Learn how to use Hydrocron in Python to access and plot SWOT L2 HR RiverSP time series data](../notebooks/datasets/Hydrocron_SWOT_timeseries_examples_basic.ipynb)

#### [Advanced Hydrocron time series example using Python and Dask to parallelize the workflow](../notebooks/datasets/Hydrocron_SWOT_timeseries_examples.ipynb)
